name: FDXSetProtocolVersion
title: FDXSetProtocolVersion
syntax: long FDXSetProtocolVersion(long fdxClientHandle, byte majorVersion, byte minorVersion);
description: This function configures the version of the FDX protocol that should be used for the communication with the specified client.

parameters.name: fdxClientHandle
parameters.description: FDX client for which the protocol version should be set.

parameters.name: majorVersion
parameters.description: Major version of the FDX protocol

parameters.name: minorVersion
parameters.description: Minor version of the FDX protocol

description: See also: Coupling of two CANoe Instances using the FDX Protocol

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
